allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix auth token not being sent with getCurrentUser request

- Add Authorization header to getCurrentUser\(\) API call
- Import HttpHeaders in auth service

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add better error handling to Trading Arena

- Use catchError for each API call in forkJoin so one failure
  doesn''t block the entire page
- Add console.error logs to identify which API call fails
- Provide default empty values when API calls fail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
